_comment: Placeholder override for PyTorch's public Hello World model (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pytorch/android-demo-app/master/HelloWorldApp/app/src/main/assets/model.pt). MobileNetV2, ImageNet 224x224 RGB, 1000-class output. Inference values are unrelated to TANUH's domain — use this only to verify the build/load/preprocessing/decoding pipeline. Replace with the real TANUH override once the actual .pt lands.

params._comment: Labels intentionally absent — argmax-labels falls back to returning classIndex as the label string. Saves shipping a 1000-line ImageNet vocabulary in this placeholder.
